name: WhatsApp MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for WhatsApp messaging — enabling AI agents to send and receive WhatsApp messages, manage contacts, read chat history, and interact with WhatsApp conversations. Supports automation of WhatsApp-based communication workflows for customer engagement, notifications, and conversational AI.
use_cases: Sending WhatsApp messages from AI customer service agents
Reading WhatsApp chat history for CRM and support workflows
Automating WhatsApp notifications from business operations agents
not_for: Mass messaging without WhatsApp Business API approval (violates ToS)
Bulk marketing campaigns without opt-in consent
Accessing WhatsApp accounts without account owner authorization
best_when: A business using WhatsApp for customer communication wants AI agents to handle message routing, responses, and notifications — using official WhatsApp Business API credentials.
avoid_when: You use unofficial WhatsApp web scraping methods — these violate Meta's ToS and risk account bans. Only use with official WhatsApp Business API. Community tool — verify API method used.

auth.notes: WhatsApp Business API credentials required — or WhatsApp Web session. Verify which method is used; official WABA is preferred.

pricing.free_tier_limits: WhatsApp Business API free tier with conversation limits
pricing.paid_tiers: WhatsApp per-conversation pricing for business messaging
pricing.notes: WhatsApp Business API has per-conversation costs. MCP server is free open source community tool.

performance.rate_limits: WhatsApp Business API rate limits; messaging windows apply

known_agent_gotchas: Verify whether tool uses official WhatsApp Business API or unofficial web session — unofficial methods risk bans
WhatsApp messaging windows: can only message users who initiated conversation in last 24h without templates
Bulk messaging without consent violates WhatsApp ToS — risk of account termination
Community tool — not official Meta/WhatsApp integration; verify maintenance and API method
agent_readiness.security_notes: Messaging system with user communication data. WhatsApp API credentials required. GDPR compliance for EU users. Only use official WhatsApp Business API for production.

security_score_components.security_notes: Messaging data. API credentials. GDPR compliance. Only official WhatsApp Business API for production.
